label: Planet layer
description: Defines a planet layer in the scenario. Specifies which layer is active, its display settings, and connections to adjacent layers.

layer.label: Layer
layer.description: PlanetLayerDef defining which planetary layer this scenario part represents.

settingsDef.label: Settings def
settingsDef.description: PlanetLayerSettingsDef providing display and behaviour settings for this layer.

hide.label: Hide
hide.description: When true, this layer is hidden from the scenario editor and player view. Defaults to false.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Unique string tag identifying this layer instance within the scenario, used as a connection target by other layers.

connections.label: Connections
connections.description: Map of connections to other planet layers. Each child element name is the target layer tag; nested elements are LayerConnection fields.
